title: ADD Discovery Manifest
description: Schema for the /.well-known/add.json discovery manifest served by ADD-native apps.

add_version.description: The ADD specification version this app implements (semver).

app_description.description: Brief description of what this app does.

documentation_url.description: Path or URL to the app's API documentation.

openapi_url.description: Path or URL to the app's OpenAPI specification.

agent_signup.description: Path to the agent signup endpoint.

agent_login.description: Path to the agent login endpoint.

profile_url.description: Path to view/update the current user's profile.

human_passkey_register.description: Path to the WebAuthn/passkey registration options endpoint.

human_passkey_login.description: Path to the WebAuthn/passkey authentication options endpoint.

human_oauth_providers.description: List of supported OAuth providers for human authentication.

ssh_namespace.description: The namespace string for SSH signature verification. MUST be the app's domain or a unique identifier.

webhook_config.description: Path to configure webhook notification settings.

sitemap_url.description: Path to the full sitemap endpoint.
